title: Having problem in calling Execute Function in Monday SDK

posts.author: rahultambe (Rahul Tambe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am trying to call a function in Monday SDK with Execute and every time I try to call I get an error of TypeError: MondayClient.Execute is not a function

I tried to fix the libraries also…If anybody can help me to understand the problem or if I am missing anything…will be a great help
